content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 NoGigiddy: Chat Support Agent (Remote) - Entry Level, No Degree Required - 15 - 18 per Hour Anywhere in the World 🇺🇸 United States of America Georgia Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5033/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Atlanta, Georgia <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.nogigiddy.com/">https://www.nogigiddy.com/</a> </p> <div><strong>About NoGigiddy:<br></strong></div> <div><br><br></div> <div><strong>NoGigiddy is a digital platform built for gig workers, side hustlers, and anyone building an income outside the traditional 9-to-5. We connect our community with real earning opportunities — remote jobs, surveys, clinical trials, gig platforms, and financial tools — all in one place, free to access, no gatekeeping. We built what we wish had existed, and we hire people who actually get it.<br></strong></div> <div><br><br></div> <div><strong>Job Description:<br></strong></div> <div><br><br></div> <div><strong>Are you looking to kickstart your career in customer support without the need for a degree or prior experience? Look no further! NoGigiddy is seeking enthusiastic and dedicated individuals to join our team as Chat Support Agents. In this entry-level role, you will be the first point of contact for our users, providing top-notch support and ensuring a seamless experience for all.<br></strong></div> <div><br><br></div> <div><strong>Responsibilities:<br></strong></div> <div><br><br></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Respond to customer inquiries via chat in a timely and professional manner<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Provide accurate information about NoGigiddy services and job opportunities<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Assist users with navigating our platform and resolving any issues they encounter<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Maintain a high level of customer satisfaction through excellent communication and problem-solving skills<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Collaborate with team members to continuously improve support processes<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Document and escalate complex issues to the appropriate departments when necessary<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Participate in training sessions to stay updated on product knowledge and customer service best practices<br></strong></div> <div><br><br></div> <div><strong>Requirements:<br></strong></div> <div><br><br></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• No degree required<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• No prior experience needed; we will provide comprehensive training<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Excellent written communication skills<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Ability to work independently and as part of a team<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Positive attitude and a willingness to learn<br></strong></div> <div><br><br></div> <div><strong>Benefits:<br></strong></div> <div><br><br></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Competitive hourly pay ($15-$18/hr)<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Flexible work-from-home schedule<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Comprehensive training program<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Opportunities for growth and advancement within the company<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Supportive team environment<br></strong></div> <div><strong>&nbsp;• Access to exclusive gig opportunities<br></strong></div> <div><br><br></div> <div><strong>Equal Opportunity Employer:<br></strong></div> <div><br><br></div> <div><strong>NoGigiddy is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.<br></strong></div> <div><br><br></div> <div><strong>Join NoGigiddy today and take the first step towards a rewarding career in customer support!<br></strong></div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/nogigiddy-chat-support-agent-remote-entry-level-no-degree-required-15-18-7">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/nogigiddy-chat-support-agent-remote-entry-level-no-degree-required-15-18-7</a></p> Sun, 03 May 2026 07:50:48 +0000 Tue, 02 Jun 2026 07:50:48 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/nogigiddy-chat-support-agent-remote-entry-level-no-degree-required-15-18-7 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/nogigiddy-chat-support-agent-remote-entry-level-no-degree-required-15-18-7 Xsolla: Full Stack Developer Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Montreal / Kuala Lumpur / Serbia / Baku / Remote </p> <div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><b>THE OPPORTUNITY:</b></div><div><br></div><div>Xsolla’s product for Creators provides a <a class="postings-link" href="https://x.la/xpn">full cohesive creative suite</a> to support their entire content creation journey, with monetisation/engagement tools as well as a central hub of opportunities to make money promoting publishers’ games. For publishers, we provide <a class="postings-link" href="https://xsolla.com/partner-network">advanced data reporting and campaign management tools</a>, to enable businesses to take a data-driven approach in promoting their latest games through content creators.</div><div><br></div><div>As a Full Stack Developer, you will work across our entire technology stack, from our React applications for creators and publishers, to the backend Node.js microservices that work to ingest data and provide our REST/gRPC APIs. You will tackle problems such as optimising queries against our large, complex database of creator data, and ensuring our systems scale to meet the demands of game launches from major publishers.</div><div><br></div><div>Our people are driven by curiosity, continual learning, good vibes, and strong opinions.
